title: Epic of Mwindo: The Congolese Hero
description: The epic of Mwindo — born miraculously, rejected by his father, who descends to the underworld and returns with supernatural powers to become chief.
introduction: The epic of Mwindo — born miraculously, rejected by his father, who descends to the underworld and returns with supernatural powers to become chief.

translation.text: Mwindo was born speaking, born walking, born holding a scepter. His father the chief was afraid and tried to kill him. But Mwindo would not die. He sang: 'I am Mwindo, the Little One Just Born He Walked!'
